languages.text: This creature can't act, dodge, parry or block and is immune to all force movement. Lose a rank of this effect every time this creature takes damage.

traits.locale_text: This creature can't act, dodge, parry or block and is immune to all force movement. Lose a rank of this effect every time this creature takes damage.

languages.text: This creature cannot act, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}block{/g}, and is immune to all forced movement effects. Whenever the creature suffers damage, a stack of this effect is removed.
languages.original_text: This creature can't act, dodge, parry or block and is immune to all force movement. Lose a rank of this effect every time this creature takes damage.

traits.locale_text: This creature cannot act, dodge, parry or block, and is immune to all forced movement effects. Whenever the creature suffers damage, a stack of this effect is removed.

This creature cannot act, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}block{/g}, and is immune to all forced movement effects. Whenever the creature suffers damage, a stack of this effect is removed.
This creature cannot act, dodge, parry, or block, and is immune to all forced movement effects. Whenever the creature suffers damage, a stack of this effect is removed.

This creature cannot act, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, or block, and is immune to all forced movement effects. Whenever the creature suffers damage, a stack of this effect is removed.

This creature cannot act, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}block{/g}, and is immune to all forced movement effects. Whenever the creature suffers damage, a stack of this effect is removed.

languages.text: Это существо не может совершать действия, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклоняться{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парировать{/g} или {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}блокировать{/g}, а также невосприимчиво к эффектам принудительного перемещения. При каждом получении урона один уровень этого эффекта снимается.
languages.original_text: This creature cannot act, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}block{/g}, and is immune to all forced movement effects. Whenever the creature suffers damage, a stack of this effect is removed.

traits.locale_text: Это существо не может совершать действия, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклоняться{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парировать{/g} или {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}блокировать{/g}, а также невосприимчиво к эффектам принудительного перемещения. При каждом получении урона один уровень этого эффекта снимается.

Это существо не может совершать действия, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклоняться{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парировать{/g} или {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}блокировать{/g}, а также невосприимчиво к эффектам принудительного перемещения. При каждом получении урона один уровень этого эффекта снимается.

languages.text: Cette créature ne peut ni agir ni {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiver{/g} ni {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parer{/g} ni {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloquer{/g}, et elle est insensible aux effets de déplacement forcé. Un cumul de cet effet est supprimé chaque fois qu'elle subit des dégâts.
languages.original_text: This creature cannot act, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}block{/g}, and is immune to all forced movement effects. Whenever the creature suffers damage, a stack of this effect is removed.

traits.locale_text: Cette créature ne peut ni agir ni {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiver{/g} ni {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parer{/g} ni {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloquer{/g}, et elle est insensible aux effets de déplacement forcé. Un cumul de cet effet est supprimé chaque fois qu'elle subit des dégâts.

languages.text: Bu yaratık eylemde bulunamaz; {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloklama{/g} yapamaz ve tüm zorunlu hareketlere karşı bağışıktır. Yaratık her hasara maruz kaldığında bu etkinin bir birikimi ortadan kalkar.
languages.original_text: This creature cannot act, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}block{/g}, and is immune to all forced movement effects. Whenever the creature suffers damage, a stack of this effect is removed.

traits.locale_text: Bu yaratık eylemde bulunamaz; {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloklama{/g} yapamaz ve tüm zorunlu hareketlere karşı bağışıktır. Yaratık her hasara maruz kaldığında bu etkinin bir birikimi ortadan kalkar.

languages.text: 该生物无法行动、{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}或{g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}格挡{/g}，且免疫所有强制位移效果。该生物每次受到伤害，移除1层此效果。
languages.original_text: This creature cannot act, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}block{/g}, and is immune to all forced movement effects. Whenever the creature suffers damage, a stack of this effect is removed.

traits.locale_text: 该生物无法行动、{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}或{g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}格挡{/g}，且免疫所有强制位移效果。该生物每次受到伤害，移除1层此效果。

languages.text: Esta criatura no puede actuar, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivar{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parar{/g} ni {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloquear{/g}, y es inmune a todos los efectos de movimiento forzado. Cada vez que la criatura sufre daño, se elimina una acumulación de este efecto.
languages.original_text: This creature cannot act, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}block{/g}, and is immune to all forced movement effects. Whenever the creature suffers damage, a stack of this effect is removed.

traits.locale_text: Esta criatura no puede actuar, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivar{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parar{/g} ni {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloquear{/g}, y es inmune a todos los efectos de movimiento forzado. Cada vez que la criatura sufre daño, se elimina una acumulación de este efecto.

languages.text: Diese Kreatur kann nicht agieren, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausweichen{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parieren{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocken{/g} und ist immun gegen alle erzwungenen Bewegungseffekte. Erleidet die Kreatur Schaden, wird ein Stapel dieses Effektes entfernt.
languages.original_text: This creature cannot act, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}block{/g}, and is immune to all forced movement effects. Whenever the creature suffers damage, a stack of this effect is removed.

traits.locale_text: Diese Kreatur kann nicht agieren, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausweichen{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parieren{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocken{/g} und ist immun gegen alle erzwungenen Bewegungseffekte. Erleidet die Kreatur Schaden, wird ein Stapel dieses Effektes entfernt.

languages.text: このクリーチャーは行動、{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}パリ{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}ブロック{/g}ができず、強制移動効果に耐性がある。このクリーチャーがダメージを受けるたびに、この効果のスタックが1つ消える。
languages.original_text: This creature cannot act, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}block{/g}, and is immune to all forced movement effects. Whenever the creature suffers damage, a stack of this effect is removed.

traits.locale_text: このクリーチャーは行動、{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}パリ{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}ブロック{/g}ができず、強制移動効果に耐性がある。このクリーチャーがダメージを受けるたびに、この効果のスタックが1つ消える。
